/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/Visualiser/Visualiser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/Reaching.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/TwoDPushing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/Optimiser/Optimiser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/Optimiser/iLQR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/Walker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/BoxSweep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/Acrobot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/Humanoid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/ThreeDPushing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/PushBaseClass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/Pentabot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/PistonBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/Optimiser/iLQR_SVR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/PushSoft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/SweepMultiple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/PlaceObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/FloatingCube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/GAOptimalKeypoints.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/ArticulatedContact.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/anyMal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/ImpactLargeBox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/BimanualPickup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/Optimiser/SCVX.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TrajOptKP.dir/src/ModelTranslator/Piston.cpp.o -o TrajOptKP  -Wl,-rpath,/home/davidrussell/mujoco/lib:/usr/local/lib libcore_lib.a /home/davidrussell/mujoco/lib/libmujoco.so.3.2.6 -lglfw -lGL -lGL /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libPNGwriter.a /lib/libOsqpEigen.so.0.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lm /usr/local/lib/libosqp.so
